reviews.review_heading: KC Group of Institutions is the best college for study.
reviews.review_text: In KC Group of Institutions, we have Wi-Fi in every class. There are 3 labs in my college. Every class has 2 sections. We have 2 libraries, one for girls and one for boys. The quality of my hostel is very good. The food is average but neat and clean. We have 2 mess halls, one for boys and one for girls. There are 2 canteens.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Nawanshahar.
reviews.review_text: In term of facilities, this college is very good. Wi-Fi facility is available all the time for students. The food quality is very good. Medical facilities are available. The labs and classrooms are well maintained. The canteen is also very good and clean.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Nawanshahar.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure provided in our course are good. All the required books are available in the library. Good Wi-Fi is available. All the required things are available in classrooms, and all required materials are present in labs for performing practicals. In my hostel, the quality of food is good. Medical facilities are provided whenever needed.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for every student. Placements were excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our MBA department was very good. The college provided many facilities like Wi-Fi and medical facilities. Management games were held in our classroom. The college has a huge library with every book required. Every year, the college organises a sports meet, and many students participate in it.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. The faculty and placements are also nice.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is enabled on the campus. The labs are in good condition. The library is big, and storage of books is appreciable. Medical facilities are available at the instant. There are a lot of other facilities like hostels are good, and the quality of food is very good. Sports facilities are available, and also we played a lot of games and enjoyed the atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is average in all terms.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There is a separate building for all courses. The playground is also good. Garden also furnished in a good way. The canteen is average. The hostel facilities were also the good and separate hostel for boys and girls with security gourd, but overall infrastructure is average.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements with good education.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms will be clean and nice. There was no projector in our classes. In labs, all the computers were working and update. The Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus and hostel. There are 2 canteens, and quality food is available. Nice playgrounds for playing cricket, football and hockey. The hostel room was good, but food in the mess was not nice.

reviews.review_heading: A learning home to gain knowledge within the campus.
reviews.review_text: KC Group of Institution provides a way for students to feel like they are in an enhanced infrastructure to study with the helping staff. Everything over there is perfect to provide student needs to learn within the campus. We do have some extra activities, and events go rapidly.
